faqs.question: How can my company partner with SpaceWing?
faqs.answer: SpaceWing welcomes partnership inquiries from innovative companies. Partnership types include: technology development, in-flight amenities, ground services, marketing collaborations, and research partnerships. Contact our Partnerships team at partnerships@spacewing.com with your company information and partnership concept. We review all proposals within 30 days.

faqs.question: What brands has SpaceWing partnered with?
faqs.answer: SpaceWing partners with leading brands including: luxury hospitality companies, gourmet food and beverage providers, technology companies, automotive manufacturers, and fashion houses. Current partners include Michelin-starred chefs for in-flight cuisine, premium watchmakers for mission timepieces, and leading technology companies for onboard systems.

faqs.question: Can research institutions collaborate with SpaceWing?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! SpaceWing has active partnerships with universities and research institutions worldwide. Opportunities include: research payload space, in-flight experiments, data sharing, joint studies, and researcher flights. Our Research Partnership Program provides access to our facilities and missions for approved research projects. Contact research@spacewing.com.

faqs.question: What is the SpaceWing Supplier Program?
faqs.answer: We're always seeking innovative suppliers for our supply chain. The Supplier Program offers: long-term contracts, technical collaboration, visibility as a SpaceWing partner, and opportunities for product development. Priority is given to suppliers meeting our sustainability and quality standards. Apply at spacewing.com/suppliers.

faqs.question: Can travel agents sell SpaceWing experiences?
faqs.answer: Yes! SpaceWing has an authorized travel agent program. Benefits include: commission on bookings, dedicated agent support, marketing materials, and training on our products. Luxury and adventure travel specialists are particularly successful. Apply for our Travel Agent Partner Program at agents.spacewing.com.

faqs.question: Does SpaceWing partner with educational institutions?
faqs.answer: Our Educational Partnership Program offers: student discounts, curriculum resources, virtual classroom sessions with astronauts, internship opportunities, and research collaboration. We partner with K-12 schools, universities, and informal education organizations. Contact education@spacewing.com to discuss partnership opportunities.

faqs.question: Can nonprofit organizations partner with SpaceWing?
faqs.answer: SpaceWing supports nonprofit organizations aligned with our mission of expanding access to space and advancing science. Partnerships can include: donated flights for fundraising, joint awareness campaigns, research collaboration, and in-kind support. Contact our Social Impact team at impact@spacewing.com with your proposal.

faqs.question: Are there co-branding opportunities?
faqs.answer: Yes! Co-branding opportunities include: mission patches, limited edition merchandise, spacecraft interior elements, and special events. Co-branded products have included watches, luggage, clothing, and collectibles. These opportunities are available for established brands with relevant market positioning. Contact partnerships@spacewing.com.

faqs.question: What is the SpaceWing Ambassador Program?
faqs.answer: Our Ambassador Program partners with astronauts, scientists, explorers, and public figures passionate about space. Ambassadors receive: exclusive access to SpaceWing events, opportunities for mission participation, speaking engagement support, and collaboration on content. Ambassadors help us inspire the next generation of space explorers.

faqs.question: How do international partnerships work?
faqs.answer: SpaceWing actively seeks international partners for: launch site development, training facilities, marketing and distribution, and technology collaboration. We comply with all US export regulations (ITAR) for international partnerships. Contact our International Development team at international@spacewing.com to discuss opportunities in your region.
